name: First Community Bank
description_short: Milton, WI is home to First Community Bank at 202 Merchant Row, a full-service banking branch for residents and businesses.
description_long:
First Community Bank's Milton, WI location is situated at 202 Merchant Row, a convenient spot for Dane County residents and businesses. This standalone branch serves as a key financial hub for Milton's banking needs. The facility provides a welcoming environment for account holders and those seeking reliable financial services.

At this Milton branch, customers can access deposit accounts, personal and business loans, and a range of banking solutions. Whether opening a savings account, applying for a mortgage, or discussing business financing options, the knowledgeable team at 202 Merchant Row is ready to assist. For detailed information about services or to schedule a consultation, visiting in person is recommended.

Milton residents who choose First Community Bank benefit from personalized service and local banking expertise. Remember to bring a government-issued ID and relevant financial documents when visiting. This community bank has established itself as a trusted banking partner for Wisconsin families and businesses.
services: Online account management and digital banking
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
Over 105 years of continuous community banking history and stability
Mobile banking apps available on both Android and iOS platforms
Online mortgage application capability for convenience
Multiple financial calculators available (mortgage, vehicle, college, credit card, retirement)
Physical branch presence with expanded storefronts and modernized facilities
Dual phone lines for customer service (1-800-261-8053 and 1-608-868-7644)
cons: Limited geographic reach as a small regional bank focused only on Milton, Wisconsin area
Website provides minimal information about specific products, rates, fees, or terms
No clear indication of competitive loan rates or account features compared to larger institutions
Minimal detail about business banking services despite having business-focused resources
Email communication explicitly discouraged due to security concerns with no secure alternative mentioned
best_for: Milton, Wisconsin residents seeking local banking relationships and community-based service
Customers preferring traditional brick-and-mortar banking with modern digital conveniences
Individuals interested in banks with deep historical roots and established community stability
diagnosis: First Community Bank is best for Milton area residents seeking traditional FDIC-insured banking with local service and modern digital options. The main caveat is the limited product transparency on their website—prospective customers will need to contact personal bankers directly to compare rates, fees, and specific product terms against competing institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Milton, WI First Community Bank at 202 Merchant Row provides personal and business banking services.
